description: Field-level data classification taxonomy. Every attribute in the event registry must reference one of these ids. Policy is stronger than capture settings: settings request capture, classification decides what is permitted.

secret.defaultBehavior: never stored, never displayed, never exported — regardless of capture mode

userSql.defaultBehavior: digest by default; plaintext only under governed elevated capture, local-only

resultData.defaultBehavior: never captured by default; digest/governed only

providerText.defaultBehavior: sanitized safe code/enum by default — provider messages can embed SQL text and values and get NO error-string loophole

identifierSensitive.defaultBehavior: digest or redact unless explicitly safe

safeEnum.defaultBehavior: stored normally — MUST be a closed enum, never free text
